title: Stone Craft
description: Stop Wasting Cobblestone in Your Chests!
body:
![English Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1fc126789f92522a96d56cb6a23006bb6affe632.png)
Here, you'll need to continuously mine stone to obtain cobblestone and compress it, then continually upgrade your gear at the crafting table to acquire higher-tier armor and weapons.

The Java Edition features brand-New Advancements.
![Advancements](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9673293b66ba63147a010a2d40216f008bcf38c.png)

All-New Multi-Tool.
![Stone Multi-Tool](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6474d3f676f65ab8f788dd26058e55c8eed6f7fc.png)

And New Enchantments!
![New enchantments](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fce28c9a86111d03dd37f3112e8417e9bc86011.png)

### Enchantments
- Stonebreaker
  - Increases mining speed for stone-type blocks.
- Stone Landing
  - Immunity to fall damage when landing on stone-type blocks.
- OLDB's Power
  - Currently has no effect.

![skip (on water)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a832958a51fcb3d765ff23c1cfbdd6e256b569a2.jpeg)

### Stone Nugget
- Can be thrown at monsters, skipped on water, or used as ammo for slingshots.
- Never throw Stone Nuggets at glass—what happens?
- Your neighbor will come out and shout at you!
![Stone Nuggets are obtained by crafting them in a Stonecutter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0df01186ca40114221b86fb0b8d2629fbaa3f7f.png)
- Stone Nuggets can be crafted in the Stonecutter or obtained by hand-breaking Stone and Cobblestone.
